name: baby cot
description: The client is a young single mother who will be delivering anytime. She has no income at the moment due to pregnancy, and there is also minimal help from the family that is also struggling financially. She is appreciative if she can have a baby cot for her baby.

passiton.description: Baby cot in good condition with slight used marks.

Bonbijou S3 playpen baby cot

name: Diapers
description: Mother is currently unemployed and have no income, while husband have an unstable job as a grab driver. They have 3 young children (5y/o, 3 y/o, and 8 mths old) and faces financial difficulties. Mother is also diagnosed with mental health issues (anxiety & depression) which adds on to caregiver stress. The family is in urgent need of diapers (Any brand, size S and M) for her 8 months old and 3 years old child.

name: Television
description: Client is a breast cancer survivor, has recently completed her treatment and suffered from multiple side effects (heart issues and swelling of eyes and nose). While her condition has improved, she is facing difficulties securing employment that is fit for her current condition. Client is unemployed, living in a 1-room rental flat and without any family support. Her rental flat is without basic appliances and hopes for a television.

passiton.name: 40" Television
passiton.description: 40" LED TV without Digital Receiver, thus cannot receive over the air channel. HDMI works very well. Will deliver to centre.

name: Single-size Mattress
description: Client lives in a rental flat and has 3 young children who are currently using bedding that is worn and no longer in suitable condition. This may be affecting their overall health, quality of rest, and school attendance. We are therefore reaching out to seek support from anyone who may be able to provide the family with 3 single mattresses. These items would help improve the children’s sleeping conditions, contributing positively to their overall well-being and daily functioning.

contact.org: Care Corner Family Service Centre - Admiralty
contact.name: Shanell Tan

name: Adult diapers
description: Client is a senior caregiver to her adult child with special needs. She is unemployed and is the main caregiver to her child and also husband with a history of stroke and heart conditions. With financial restrains, the family will benefit greatly from a sponsor for her child's diapers as they are a regular expense.

name: Adult Diapers
description:
The client is a stroke survivor, living in a 2-room HDB rental flat. Her husband is the sole breadwinner of the family, and their 3 adult children have moved out, with their individual commitments and families. 

The client is not drinking sufficient water as she avoids going to the toilet, due to mobility issues. 

The adult diapers will be helpful to allow her to ensure adequate hydration. 

She needs size XL, pants, adult diapers.

name: Adult Diapers
description:
The client is widowed for many years and single-handedly raised up 3 children. She lives in a one-room HDB rental flat with her second son who is struggling financially. 

The client needs adult diapers as she has urine incontinence and refrains from drinking water to avoid going to the toilet. 

Having adult diapers will be very helpful for the elderly client, to ensure hydration and to alleviate her concern of frequent toileting.
